aeo_readiness.summary: Norris Air has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with clear service offerings and contact information. However, there is room for improvement in content depth, user engagement, and local SEO signals.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve engagement.
Enhance content with targeted keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Implement a blog strategy to address common HVAC questions and improve organic search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website has basic GBP (Google Business Profile) elements such as service pages and contact information, but lacks customer reviews and detailed location-specific content.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which are crucial for local SEO and trust building.
Missing detailed location-specific content that could improve local search rankings.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website, but lacks citations on external directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile to improve local search presence.
List the business on relevant local directories and citation sites such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
Missing Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed location and service area information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers seeking social proof
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and adding FAQ content
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative blog content and targeting long-tail HVAC keywords

page_title: Heating & AC Company in Mesa, AZ | Norris Air
